systems.system_notes: Official source anchor for Fujifilm Sonosite point-of-care ultrasound systems.

components.component_notes: Premium Fujifilm Sonosite point-of-care ultrasound system with large clinical display.
Advanced Fujifilm Sonosite point-of-care ultrasound system referenced in the current portfolio.
Fujifilm Sonosite transducer launched alongside Sonosite LX and PX workflow support.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public Sonosite ultrasound pages do not define a tray or procedure kit in the current pass.
unresolved_items.reason: Tray rows should only be added from accessory-cart or packaged procedural-set sources.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current public product family pages do not expose a normalized ordering-code matrix for this pass.
